user.title: IR Remote Manager
user.description:
Enter the entity ID of your IR blaster. It must support the `remote.learn_command` and `remote.send_command` services (Broadlink, ZHA, MQTT remote, etc.).

The Broadlink storage path is optional — only needed if you want to import codes already learned via the Broadlink integration.

data.broadlink_storage: Broadlink storage file (optional — leave blank if not using Broadlink)

abort.already_configured: IR Remote Manager is already configured.
